member.name: F:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.VnOffset
member.summary: Nếu sau có xử lý liên quan đến thời gian thì thay thành DateTimeOffset

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.ToCurrentTimeOfDayUtc(System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Converts DateOnly to DateTimeOffset at current time of day with Vietnamese timezone offset, then converts to UTC

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.ToCurrentTimeOfDayUtc(System.Nullable{System.DateOnly})
member.summary: Converts nullable DateOnly to DateTimeOffset at current time of day with Vietnamese timezone offset, then converts to UTC

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.ToStartOfDay(System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Converts DateOnly to DateTime at the start of the day (00:00:00)

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.ToEndOfDay(System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Converts DateOnly to DateTime at the end of the day (23:59:59.9999999)

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.ToDateOnlyVn(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Converts DateTimeOffset to DateOnly with Vietnamese timezone offset

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.ToDateOnly(System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Converts DateTimeOffset to DateOnly with Vietnamese timezone offset

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.DateOnlyExtensions.ToDateOnlyVn(System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Converts nullable DateTimeOffset to DateOnly with Vietnamese timezone offset

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.GlobalFilterExtensions.WhereGlobalFilter``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.IMayHaveGlobalFilter,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.String}}[])
member.summary: Áp dụng điều kiện WhereIf cho GlobalFilter search trên nhiều thuộc tính string. Xây dựng điều kiện OR động cho tất cả property selectors được cung cấp.
member.param: Expressions để select các thuộc tính string để search

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.GuidExtensions.GetId(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Guid nhưng có sắp xếp thứ tự tăng dần

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.LinqExtension.Apply(System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression[])
member.summary: Substitutes an array of Expression args for the parameters of a lambda, returning a new Expression
member.param: The Expression[] of values to substitute for the parameters of e.
member.returns: Expression representing e.Body with args substituted in

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.LinqExtension.Replace``1(``0,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression)
member.summary: Replaces an Expression (reference Equals) with another Expression
member.returns: Expression with all occurrences of from replaced with to

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.LinqExtension.ReplaceVisitor
member.summary: ExpressionVisitor to replace an Expression (that is Equals) with another Expression.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.LinqExtension.ReplaceVisitor.#ctor(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression)
member.summary: ExpressionVisitor to replace an Expression (that is Equals) with another Expression.

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.LinqExtension.NullVisitor
member.summary: ExpressionVisitor to replace a null.member Expression with a null

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.MappingExtensions.MapTo``2(``0)
member.summary: Maps all publicly readable properties from onto publicly writable properties of with the same name.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.PropertyInfoExtensions.GetDescription(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Lấy giá trị Description từ attribute [Description] của property. Nếu không có attribute, trả về tên property.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.StringExtension.GetDescriptionFromName``1(System.String)
member.summary: Chuyển tên enum (string) sang DescriptionAttribute của giá trị enum tương ứng.
member.returns: Chuỗi description, hoặc null nếu không tìm thấy.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.ExtensionMethods.StringExtension.GetDefaultValue(System.Type)
member.summary: Lấy giá trị mặc định của một kiểu dữ liệu.

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.DynamicExportInstruction
member.summary: Instruction for dynamic export using dictionary data without property reflection. Reads column mappings from Excel template ($FieldName markers).

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.HierarchicalExportInstruction`2
member.summary: Configuration for hierarchical Excel export with grouped headers Template markers: - $Header_{GroupLevel}_{FieldName} for group headers (e.g., $Header_1_LinhVuc, $Header_2_PhongBan) - $Count_{FieldName} for count columns (e.g., $Count_SoLuongNhiemVu) - $Data_{FieldName} for data columns (e.g., $Data_STT, $Data_NoiDung)

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.HierarchicalExportInstruction`2.GetGroupHeader
member.summary: Function to get group header text

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.HierarchicalExportInstruction`2.GetSubGroups
member.summary: Function to get sub-groups from a group

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.HierarchicalExportInstruction`2.GetSubGroupHeader
member.summary: Function to get sub-group header text

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.HierarchicalExportInstruction`2.GetItems
member.summary: Function to get items from a sub-group

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.HierarchicalExportInstruction`2.GetSubGroupCount
member.summary: Function to get count for sub-group

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.TwoLevelHierarchicalInstruction`3
member.summary: Simpler instruction for 2-level hierarchy (Group -> Items)

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IAsposeHelper.EnsureLicense(System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Add license

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IAsposeHelper.FindTableStartPosition(Aspose.Cells.Worksheet,System.String)
member.summary: Tìm vị trí bắt đầu của tất cả các Table hoặc một Table theo tên.
member.param: Tên table (tùy chọn). Nếu không truyền sẽ trả toàn bộ danh sách.
member.returns: Nếu có tên table → trả về vị trí (row, column) đầu tiên của table đó. Nếu không có tên table → trả về danh sách tất cả các vị trí.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IAsposeHelper.ExtractMergeInstruction(Aspose.Cells.Worksheet)
member.summary: Extract merge instructions from worksheet

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IExporterHelper.Export``1(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.AsposeInstruction{``0})
member.summary: Export template động dựa trên placeholders $FieldName
member.param: Hướng dẫn export chứa template path, items và hidden columns

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IExporterHelper.ExportDynamic(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.DynamicExportInstruction)
member.summary: Export dynamic using dictionary data - reads column mappings from Excel template. No property reflection required, maps dictionary keys to template columns directly.
member.param: Instruction with dictionary items and template path

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IExporterHelper.ExportHierarchical``3(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.TwoLevelHierarchicalInstruction{``0,``1,``2})
member.summary: Export hierarchical data với 2 cấp group (LinhVuc -> PhongBan -> Items) Template markers: - Row 1: $Header_1 (group header, full merge) - Row 2: $Header_2 | $Count (sub-group header, partial merge + count) - Row 3: $STT | $NoiDung | $Field1 | ... (data row)

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IExporterHelper.ExportWithOutline``1(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.TreeOutlineInstruction{``0})
member.summary: Export tree data with Excel outline grouping (expand/collapse) Uses Level property for hierarchical grouping

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IExporterHelper.ExportMultiLevelHierarchical(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction)
member.summary: Export multi-level hierarchical data with vertical cell merging. Supports N levels of hierarchy where certain columns can be merged vertically per root group. Uses dictionary-based data for flexibility.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.IImporterHelper.GetTemplate(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.List{BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.ComboData}})
member.summary: Export template động dựa trên placeholders $FieldName

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction
member.summary: Configuration for multi-level hierarchical Excel export with vertical cell merging. Supports N levels of hierarchy where certain columns can be merged vertically per group.

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction.MergedColumnIndices
member.summary: Column indices for vertically merged columns (0-based). These columns will be merged across all rows within each root group.

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction.Rows
member.summary: Data rows with Level property indicating hierarchy depth. Level 1 = root group, Level 2 = subgroup, etc.

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction.LevelPropertyName
member.summary: Property name to determine hierarchy level from each row. Default: "Level"

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction.SttPropertyName
member.summary: Property name for STT (row number within root group). Used to fill STT column automatically.

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction.SttColumnIndex
member.summary: Column index for STT (if auto-numbering needed).

member.name: P:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction.TemplateRowIndex
member.summary: Template row index (0-based) where $ markers are located.

member.name: T:BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.TreeOutlineInstruction`1
member.summary: Configuration for tree-based Excel export with outline grouping (expand/collapse) Uses Aspose.Cells GroupRows API for Excel row grouping
